input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.2.5
            TITLE: correction

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.2.5: Correction
IN.2.5 Correction 
If any part of a vehicle does not comply with the rules, or is otherwise a concern, the team 
must: 
• Correct the problem 
• Continue Inspection or have the vehicle Reinspected

final_answer: rule IN.2.5: Correction IN.2.5 Correction If any part of a vehicle does not comply with the rules, or is otherwise a concern, the team must: • Correct the problem • Continue Inspection or have the vehicle Reinspected
